text.title: Release Train Coordination Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: How many releases per quarter does the team ship?

conclusion.verdict: skip — too few releases to justify a train

branch.question: Are hotfix paths distinct from feature releases?

conclusion.verdict: author release-train.yml with window + freeze + branches
establish hotfix path first, then return

example.trace: input matches `releases_per_quarter >= 3` → sub-question → `hotfix_distinct == true` → conclusion ref=`window-pinned`.
